dataflow.description: Criterion-driven what-if shadow study: tall buildings (height > 20 m) in Boston's Back Bay are raised by 3× in the modified scenario. The two grammar nodes load the same OSM data independently, letting you compare baseline vs modified heights side-by-side.

nodes.goal: Baseline view — Boston Back Bay buildings coloured by their original OSM height.
Modified scenario — buildings taller than 20 m are raised by 3× via a GPU compute step.

dataflow.name: Autark what-if shadow study
